---
title: "GSD EHR Burden Analysis"
author: "JP Giliberto"
format: dashboard
orientation: columns
---

```{r}
#| eval: false
# load, rectangularize and export
library(rjson)
library(tidyverse)
library (lubridate)
library(gt)

filenamesignal <- list.files("C:/Users/jpgil/OneDrive/Research - Primary/Epic/GSD/JSON Files", pattern="*.json", full.names=TRUE) # this should give you a character vector, with each file name represented by an entry

PEP <- lapply(filenamesignal, function(x) fromJSON(file=x))

PEP1 <- tibble(PEP) |> 
   unnest_longer(PEP) |> 
  filter(PEP_id=="Data")

RawSignalData <- PEP1|> 
  unnest_auto(PEP) |> 
  unnest_wider(PEP) |> 
    select(-PEP_id)

ExportSignalData <- RawSignalData |> 
  select(1,3,9:14)

write.csv(ExportSignalData,"Signal Data GSD.csv")

GSDFaculty <- RawSignalData |> 
  group_by(`Clinician Name`, `EMP CID`) |> 
  count()

write.csv(GSDFaculty,"GSD Faculty.csv")

```

```{r}
#|code-fold: true
#|warning: false

#loading standard packages for data wrangle and visualization. JPG just commented out packages I don't think we will use. 
library (tidyverse)
library(readr)
library (lubridate)
library(readxl)
library(forcats)
library(scales)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggrepel)
library(janitor)
library(gt)
#library(ggridges)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(broom.mixed)
library(fuzzyjoin)
#library(ggsignif)

#signal data raw with dates
SignalRaw1 <- read_csv("Signal Data GSD.csv") |> 
  select (ID = `EMP CID`, Name = `Clinician Name`, StartDate = `Reporting Period Start Date`, Metric:Value)

#eliminate months where the provider did not see more than a threshold (at least 20). 25 of 778 (3.2%) provider months eliminated
KeyApptsPerMo <- SignalRaw1 |> 
  filter(Metric == "Appointments per Day") |> 
  select(ID,StartDate,Numerator) |> 
  mutate(ThresholdAppt = Numerator >15) |>  
  #count(ThresholdAppt) |> 
  select(-Numerator)

SignalRaw <- SignalRaw1 |> 
  left_join(KeyApptsPerMo) |> 
  filter(ThresholdAppt) |> 
  select(-ThresholdAppt)

key_GSDFaculty <- read_csv("GSD Faculty.csv") |> 
  rename(ID = `EMP CID`) |> 
  mutate(GenderRank = str_c(Gender, Rank, sep = " "))

KeyDenominator<- SignalRaw |> 
  select(ID,StartDate,Metric, Numerator, Denominator) |>
  mutate(DenomUnits = case_when(str_detect(Metric, "Time in Notes per Appointment") ~ "per Appointment",
                                 str_detect(Metric, "Time in System per Day") ~ "per Day with a Login",
                                 str_detect(Metric, "Time On Unscheduled Days") ~ "per Unscheduled Day",
                                str_detect(Metric, "Appointments per Day") ~ "per Scheduled Day",
                                 T ~ NA)) |> 
  filter(!is.na(DenomUnits)) |> 
  group_by(ID,StartDate, DenomUnits) |> 
  summarise(denom_max = max(Denominator, na.rm = T)) |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = DenomUnits,values_from = denom_max)

ApptPerTypicalGSDClinic <-  12
```

# TOTAL SYSTEM BURDEN

## Column {width=25%}  

```{r}

TotalSystemTimeMeans <- SignalRaw |> 
  filter(Metric == "Time in System per Day") |> 
  left_join(KeyDenominator) |> 
  select(Name, ID,StartDate, Numerator, `per Appointment`) |> 
  mutate(value = (Numerator/`per Appointment`)/60*ApptPerTypicalGSDClinic) |> 
  left_join(key_GSDFaculty) |> 
  group_by(GenderRank) |> 
  summarise(`Mean Total Time in Epic (hr)` = round(mean(value, na.rm =T),1)) |> 
  gt()

TotalSystemTimeMeans
  
```
## Column {width=75%} 

```{r}

TotalSystemTime <- SignalRaw |> 
  filter(Metric == "Time in System per Day") |> 
  left_join(KeyDenominator) |> 
  select(Name, ID,StartDate, Numerator, `per Appointment`) |> 
  mutate(value = (Numerator/`per Appointment`)/60*ApptPerTypicalGSDClinic) |> 
  left_join(key_GSDFaculty) |> 
  select(ID, StartDate, GenderRank, value)

plot_data <- TotalSystemTime %>%
  filter(!is.na(value) & value <15 ) 


ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = GenderRank, y = value, fill = GenderRank)) +
  
  # Distribution shape
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.6, trim = T) +
  
  # Quartiles + median
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.color = "red", alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("lightpink1","lightpink2", "lightpink3", "royalblue1", "royalblue3","royalblue4" ))+
  labs(
    title = "Total Epic Sytem Time per Day by Gender and Rank",
    x = "Gender and Academic Rank",
    y = "Mean hrs in System Per Clinic Day"
  ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")
  )

```
# AMBULATORY TIME BURDEN

## Column {width=25%} 

```{r}

AmbTimeMeans <- SignalRaw |> 
  filter(str_detect(Metric,"per Appointment") & str_detect(Metric,"Time")) |> 
  group_by(ID,StartDate) |> 
  summarise(TotalAmb = (sum(Value, na.rm = F)/60*ApptPerTypicalGSDClinic)) |> 
  left_join(key_GSDFaculty) |> 
  group_by(GenderRank) |> 
  summarise(`Mean Amb Time in Epic (hr)` = round(mean(TotalAmb, na.rm =T),1)) |> 
  gt()

AmbTimeMeans
```
## Column {width=75%} 

```{r}
AmbTime <- SignalRaw |> 
  filter(str_detect(Metric,"per Appointment") & str_detect(Metric,"Time")) |> 
  group_by(ID,StartDate) |> 
  summarise(value = (sum(Value, na.rm = F)/60*ApptPerTypicalGSDClinic)) |> 
  left_join(key_GSDFaculty) |> 
  select(ID, StartDate, GenderRank, value)

plot_data <- TotalSystemTime %>%
  filter(!is.na(value) & value <15 ) 

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = GenderRank, y = value, fill = GenderRank)) +
  
  # Distribution shape
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.6, trim = T) +
  
  # Quartiles + median
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.color = "red", alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("lightpink1","lightpink2", "lightpink3", "royalblue1", "royalblue3","royalblue4" ))+
  labs(
    title = "Total Ambulatory Time per Day by Gender and Rank",
    x = "Gender and Academic Rank",
    y = "Mean hrs in System Per Clinic Day"
  ) +
  
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")
  )


```
# Time in EHR by Activity

##  Column - Table Tactivity {width=50%} 
```{r}
#| title: "Mean Time in Activity (hr) per Full Clinic"

ByActivityMeans <- SignalRaw |> 
  filter(str_detect(Metric,"per Appointment") & str_detect(Metric,"Time")) |> 
  mutate(TimeInActivity = round((Value/60*ApptPerTypicalGSDClinic),2)) |> 
  select(ID,StartDate,Metric, TimeInActivity) |> 
  left_join(key_GSDFaculty) |> 
  group_by(Metric,GenderRank) |> 
  summarise(`Mean Time in Acivity (hr)` = round(mean(TimeInActivity, na.rm =T),1)) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = "Metric",values_from = `Mean Time in Acivity (hr)`) |> 
  gt() |> 
  #tab_header(title = md("Hrs per 16 Appointment Clinc (lower = better)")) |> 
  data_color(
    method = "numeric",
    palette = c("aquamarine", "wheat", "pink")) |> 
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    columns = everything()) 
  
    #IMPORTANT: reverse so low=green, high=re

ByActivityMeans

```

##  Column - Graph Tactivity {width=50%} 
```{r}
#| title: "Mean Time in Activity (hr) per Full Clinic"

ByActivityMeansGraph <- SignalRaw |> 
  filter(str_detect(Metric,"per Appointment") & str_detect(Metric,"Time")) |> 
  mutate(TimeInActivity = round((Value/60*ApptPerTypicalGSDClinic),2)) |> 
  select(ID,StartDate,Metric, TimeInActivity) |> 
  left_join(key_GSDFaculty) |> 
  group_by(Metric,GenderRank) |> 
  summarise( value = round(mean(TimeInActivity, na.rm =T),1)) 


# ---- 0) Ensure expected column names ----
# If your columns are named differently, rename them here:
# ByActivityMeansGraph <- ByActivityMeansGraph %>% rename(Metric = <col1>, GenderRank = <col2>, Value = <col3>)

# ---- 1) Clean & coerce Value to numeric (handles things like "0.s") ----
ByActivityMeansGraph_clean <- ByActivityMeansGraph %>%
  mutate(
    Value = as.character(value),
    Value = str_replace_all(value, ",", "."),
    Value = str_replace(value, "^0\\.s$", "0.5"),  # fix the typo you showed
    Value = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(value))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Value))

# Ensure clean factor order (adjust to your desired order)
metric_order <- c(
  "Time in Orders per Appointment",
  "Time in Notes per Appointment",
  "Time in In Basket per Appointment",
  "Time in Clinical Review per Appointment"
)

gender_rank_order <- c(
  "Female Assistant", "Female Associate", "Female Full",
  "Male Assistant", "Male Associate", "Male Full"
)

df <- ByActivityMeansGraph_clean %>%
  mutate(
    Value = as.numeric(Value),
    Metric = factor(Metric, levels = metric_order),
    GenderRank = factor(GenderRank, levels = gender_rank_order)
  )

totals_df <- df %>%
  group_by(GenderRank) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(df, aes(x = GenderRank, y = Value, fill = Metric)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75, color = "white", linewidth = 0.3, position = position_stack()) +
  # segment labels centered in each stacked block
  geom_text(
    aes(label = number(Value, accuracy = 0.1)),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    size = 3,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  # total above each stack
  geom_text(
    data = totals_df,
    aes(x = GenderRank, y = total, label = number(total, accuracy = 0.1)),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    vjust = -0.35,
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 3.3
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.10))) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("cadetblue1", "aquamarine","lightpink","wheat")) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Time per Appointment",
    fill = "Metric"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )

```

```
